caption: A legislative hearing is taking place in a formal room where several individuals sit behind a long table. A man with a gray beard and glasses, wearing a dark suit and pale green tie, gestures with both hands while speaking. Beside him, a bald man in a dark suit adjusts his glasses, and another man in a gray vest and white shirt looks on. A woman with blonde hair, dressed in a dark patterned top, sits at the end of the table. On the table are water bottles, glasses, and microphones. A banner across the bottom of the scene features the "ORCA" logo and the text "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" and "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage". Across the sequence, the man with the beard continues to gesture emphatically, while the other attendees maintain their positions, watching and listening.
